nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Snow. Cloudy. Low around 26, with temperatures rising to around 31 overnight. Northwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Snow then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow before 9am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 39. Northwest wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Freezing Rain
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of freezing rain between 3am and 4am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 28, with temperatures rising to around 31 overnight. West wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday
